metadata.description: 20 modular skills for idiomatic Go, derived from Effective Go, Google Go Style Guide, Uber Go Style Guide, and Go Wiki CodeReviewComments. Backed by 48 reference files, 8 automation scripts (all with --json, --limit, --force), and 4 asset templates.

plugins.name: golang-skills
plugins.description: 20 Go skills (each under 225 lines) with progressive disclosure, conditional cross-references, and bundled automation. Covers style, naming, error handling, testing, concurrency, generics, logging, documentation, performance, and more.
